title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: Tel Aviv, Israel / New York (Global, distributed)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Experience working with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ is required.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with proven expertise in Salesforce, pipeline forecasting, and GTM scaling directly aligns with Finout's need for a hands-on Head of RevOps. The role's Tel Aviv HQ presence and global distribution match his location preferences perfectly, and his experience scaling revenue operations across high-growth companies maps directly to Finout's $30M+ ARR scaling challenges.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Finout is building out its Revenue Operations function from the Tel Aviv HQ—a market you know well. With your 15+ years scaling RevOps and GTM engines in high-growth B2B SaaS, plus deep Salesforce expertise and experience managing globally distributed teams, you'd be uniquely positioned to architect the operational backbone that scales Finout's cloud cost management platform the way it's scaled Wiz and Lyft's operations. The role reporting directly to the CRO seems tailor-made for your background.

title: Head of Revenue Operations - PE Backed Fintech/SaaS Business
description: Zearch is recruiting a Head of Revenue Operations for a PE-backed fintech/SaaS business. The role focuses on building and leading revenue operations across the go-to-market organization, owning systems, processes, forecasting, and data to drive predictable revenue growth. The ideal candidate brings senior RevOps leadership experience within high-growth, private-equity-backed B2B SaaS or fintech environments, along with strong Salesforce and analytics capabilities and proven cross-functional alignment across Sales, Marketing, and Finance.
score_reason: Exceptional alignment with Omri's core expertise in RevOps leadership, B2B SaaS, fintech, Salesforce, and pipeline forecasting. Remote location and PE-backed structure match his background and preferences perfectly.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure in B2B SaaS and fintech, and your Head of RevOps role at Zearch caught my attention. PE-backed businesses require the exact blend of systems rigor, cross-functional alignment, and predictable revenue infrastructure that I've scaled multiple times. I'd be excited to discuss how I can build and lead your go-to-market operations from day one.

title: RevOps Manager
description: HopSkipDrive, a technology company solving transportation challenges, seeks a RevOps Manager reporting to the Director of Revenue Operations. Responsibilities include maintaining CRM hygiene, leading sales enablement, supporting forecasting and pipeline standards, and managing pricing, renewals, and incentive compensation. Requires 3-5 years in Sales Operations or RevOps within high-growth B2B SaaS or marketplace environments, strong analytical skills, stakeholder management, and expertise with Salesforce, Tableau, and Coefficient. Salary range $90k-$120k.
score_reason: Strong technical alignment (Salesforce, forecasting, pipeline standards, compensation management) and remote US location works well, but role is positioned as individual contributor reporting to Director—significantly below Omri's senior executive level (Head of RevOps/GTM roles). Overqualified for the seniority level and likely compensation band.
ai_opener: I noticed HopSkipDrive is scaling its revenue operations function—your focus on CRM hygiene, forecasting standards, and compensation management are critical foundations. With 15+ years building RevOps from the ground up across high-growth B2B SaaS and marketplace models, I've led teams through similar scaling challenges. Open to discussing how I might support your revenue operations strategy at a level that leverages cross-functional GTM leadership.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: UTTR, a B2B marketing agency specializing in paid advertising, creative, and revenue operations, is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager. The role involves strategic planning with clients to understand their revenue operations and business goals, creating project roadmaps, providing strategic recommendations, and building ongoing partnerships with client stakeholders. Requires B2B SaaS experience, adaptability to new RevOps tools and technologies, and ideally startup experience. Fully remote team with global flexibility, though work must align with US time zones.
score_reason: Strong RevOps expertise and B2B SaaS background align well with the role's strategic planning and client partnership needs. However, the agency-side service delivery model is a notable pivot from Omri's core strength in building internal RevOps functions at product companies, and the paid advertising focus sits outside his typical expertise.
ai_opener: Hi – I saw UTTR is building out your RevOps Manager role, and the combination of strategic client advisory with RevOps tooling modernization caught my attention. With 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS (HubSpot, Salesforce, pipeline forecasting), I've spent my career doing exactly what you're describing – partnering with stakeholders to architect revenue operations that drive predictable growth. I'm curious whether you're seeing patterns in client RevOps maturity gaps that you'd like to solve systematically.

title: GTM Engineer

ai_opener: Omri here—your GTM Engineer role caught my attention because building internal tools and lead scoring automations is exactly where I've seen RevOps unlock the most leverage. With 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM, I've built similar attribution and onboarding workflows, and I'm impressed by Conveo's focus on replacing tribal knowledge with AI-powered processes. title: GTM Engineer

title: Marketing Technology Manager
